Gemini vs Otter.ai (2026): Which Should You Use?

Gemini and Otter.ai are both popular tools in the AI Productivity Tools space. Here's how they compare.

GeminiOtter.ai
MakerGoogleOtter.ai
PricingFree plan available; Gemini Advanced from $19.99/mo (via Google One AI Premium)Free plan available (limited minutes/month); paid plans from $8.33/mo
Free tierYesYes
Best forUsers already inside the Google Workspace / Android ecosystem.Teams wanting automatic meeting notes and action items.

Gemini

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.
